x4freetext: beamline (Back-n) of the China Spallation Neutron
Neutrons are produced via 1.6 GeV proton-
induced spallation reactions on a Tungsten target.
The incident proton pulse was in double-bunch mode.
The diameter of the neutron beam spot was about 40 mm,
and the neutron flux was about 2.0E6 n/cm2/s.
